title: xylopia platycarpa
intro: Xylopia platycarpa, also known as the African plum or wild pepper, is a species of plant in the Annonaceae family native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Xylopia platycarpa include the relief of respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of malaria. Herbal preparations of Xylopia platycarpa often involve extracting its essential oils or using its roots and leaves in teas and infusions.
